name: BillDueDate
description: Customer is asking when their bill is due, what date payment is expected, or checking their billing schedule — they are not trying to change the date or understand charges on their bill.

sampleUtterances.utterance: When is my {billingPeriod} bill due?
What date do I need to pay my bill by?
Can you tell me when my next payment is expected?
Check my {billingPeriod} bill date for me
I want to know the deadline for my {billingPeriod} bill
When does my direct debit come out?
What day of the month is my bill taken?
Could you let me know when my first payment is due?
I just need to know what date my bill goes out
When am I supposed to pay this month?
My {billingPeriod} bill — when is it due?
Tell me when my payment is scheduled
I can't remember what date my bill is on
How many days until my {billingPeriod} bill is due?
Is my bill due this week?
What's the payment date on my account?
Do I need to pay before the end of the month?
When will my {billingPeriod} payment be taken from my account?
I need to check when my bill comes out so I can make sure I have the money
bill due date
